changes.description: Repositioned modal close button above video container and replaced carousel-nav-btn class with modal-close-btn
details: Moved close button element from after the video container to before it (still within the relative wrapper)
Changed positioning from `-top-5 -right-5 md:-top-6 md:-right-6` to `-top-12 right-0 md:-top-14` - button now floats 48px/56px above the video container's top edge
Replaced `carousel-nav-btn` class with `modal-close-btn` for semantic separation
Removed inline `border-white text-white` utility classes (now handled by the new CSS class)
Kept `testimonial-video-close` class for JS selector compatibility
Preserved SVG close icon markup unchanged

changes.description: Added new .modal-close-btn CSS class with white default state and gradient hover animation
details: Created independent .modal-close-btn class (not coupled to carousel-nav-btn)
Default state: white border and white text (always, since modal backdrop is always dark)
Structural styles match carousel-nav-btn: inline-flex, w-10/h-10 md:w-12/h-12, rounded-full, relative, isolation: isolate
Gradient hover: reuses existing --gradient-left/--gradient-right CSS custom properties and carousel-nav-gradient-sweep animation
On hover: border and text switch to charcoal for contrast against gradient fill
SVG sizing: w-5/h-5 md:w-6/h-6 (same as carousel nav buttons)

phpChanges.description: Modal close button repositioned and restyled

cssChanges.description: New .modal-close-btn class with white default state and gradient hover

syncStatus.notes: TSX file does not render the modal (PHP-only), so no TSX changes were needed. The modal is rendered once globally via static flag in PHP template.

jsImpact.description: No JS changes required. The TestimonialsCarousel.js file selects the close button via `.testimonial-video-close` class which was preserved.

webpackWarnings: Asset size warnings (pre-existing, not related to changes)

lintStatus.notes: Linter errors are in other unrelated blocks (Accordion, ButtonRow, ContentWithMedia, etc.). No errors in TestimonialsCarousel.tsx. The files modified (PHP and CSS) are not linted by ESLint.

designDecisionsImplemented.decision: Close button positioned -top-12 (mobile) and -top-14 (desktop) with right-0 alignment
designDecisionsImplemented.rationale: Places button 48px/56px above video container, visually separated from the video area while remaining within the max-w-4xl wrapper for alignment

designDecisionsImplemented.decision: Reused existing gradient system (--gradient-left/--gradient-right) and carousel-nav-gradient-sweep animation
designDecisionsImplemented.rationale: Maintains visual consistency with theme's interactive element hover pattern
Semantic separation ensures future changes to carousel-nav-btn won't affect modal close button

checkpoints: Visual inspection: close button position relative to video container (should be clearly above, not overlapping corner)
Default state: white border and icon have sufficient contrast against dark modal backdrop
Hover state: gradient fill animation plays smoothly, text/border switch to charcoal
Functional test: button still opens/closes modal correctly (JS selector preserved)
Responsive test: button positioning at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1440px) widths
qaRequirements.notes: Modal is hidden by default in static screenshots. QA requires manual/interactive testing or browser automation with modal trigger simulation.
